name: Microsoft Agent Academy Hackathon
risks: 生态绑定较强，复用价值低，默认只作反例或参考。
next_48h_plan: 抽取可借鉴的评分项和材料结构。
验证系统能识别生态绑定风险并降级处理。
evidence: L7: Open to everyone except Microsoft employees and immediate family members.
L9: The official material requires at least one Microsoft product. The practical center of gravity is Microsoft Copilot Studio, M365, and Microsoft low-code workflows.
L11: Local constraint: Windows, 8GB GPU. API/cloud is feasible, but the project would become platform-config heavy instead of code-first.
L13: Decision note: Use as reference only. Do not make it active because single-ecosystem lock-in reduces reuse value.
